evals.name: precommit-clippy-unwrap
evals.prompt: mise pre-commit-run failed with a clippy unwrap_used error in finstack-py/src/bindings/valuations/attribution.rs. Diagnose it, fix the root cause, and run the smallest relevant verification.
evals.expected_output: A triage response that identifies the first real clippy error, fixes the binding error path without adding an allow, and verifies with targeted build/lint/test commands.
